description: Style Notenew hide comes up with this item du jour - just right to add a new season twist to your off-duty wardrobe. Style this belt with tonal shoes (no sports shoes please!) to get the look just right.Product DetailsThick brown belt with a dark grey tang claspHas a fixed branded loop with holes to customise the FitRivet and stitch detail along the beltMaterial and careLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
